mapper.select:
select su.id id, su.user_name userName, su.display_name displayName, su.email email, su.phone_number phoneNumber, su.leave_status leaveStatus, su.office_location officeLocation, su.post post, su.birthday birthday, su.induction_date inductionDate, su.leave_date leaveDate, su.gender gender, su.direct_manager_code directManagerCode, su.organization_code organizationCode from system_user su
su.deleted = 0
and su.user_name like '%' || #{search.userName} || '%' ESCAPE '/'
and su.display_name like '%' || #{search.displayName} || '%' ESCAPE '/'
select group_id from system_user_group_r where user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0 order by group_id

select r.user_id as userId, r.group_id as groupId, g.name as groupName from system_user_group_r r left join system_user_group g on g.id = r.group_id
r.deleted = 0 and g.deleted = 0
and r.user_id in
#{userId}
order by r.user_id, r.group_id

select u.id, u.user_name userName, u.display_name displayName, u.email email, u.office_location officeLocation, u.post post from system_user u
deleted = 0
and ( u.user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ESCAPE '/') or (u.display_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ESCAPE '/')
select user_name || '_' || display_name from system_user where deleted = 0
